title: senecio biflorus
intro: Senecio biflorus, also known as two-flowered ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and taproot. The medicinal properties of Senecio biflorus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. The health benefits of consuming Senecio biflorus include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential to support liver health and treat respiratory issues. Traditionally, Senecio biflorus has been prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
